---
title: "Professional Services Staff"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="border-left-color: #b01c2e;"}
Our dedicated professional services team manages the day-to-day operations, administration, and technical software support for the CDT.
:::

<!-- Estilos customizados para os Cards da Equipe -->
<style>
  .staff-card {
    background: #ffffff;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 24px;
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
    transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .staff-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    border-color: #b01c2e;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  }
  .staff-img {
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 3px solid #e2e8f0;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    background-color: #f1f5f9;
  }
  .staff-role {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #64748b;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 5px;
    background: #f8fafc;
    padding: 4px 12px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  }
</style>

::: {.grid}

<!-- Suzanne Binding -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.staff-card}
<img class="staff-img" src="staff/suzanne_binding.png" alt="Suzanne Binding" onerror="this.src='data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns=\'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\' viewBox=\'0 0 24 24\' fill=\'%23cbd5e1\'><path d=\'M12 12c2.21 0 4-1.79 4-4s-1.79-4-4-4-4 1.79-4 4 1.79 4 4 4zm0 2c-2.67 0-8 1.34-8 4v2h16v-2c0-2.66-5.33-4-8-4z\'/></svg>'">
<h5 class="fw-bold m-0" style="color: #1e293b; font-size: 1.1rem;">Suzanne Binding</h5>
<span class="staff-role">CDT Manager</span>
:::
:::

<!-- Jas Rice -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.staff-card}
<img class="staff-img" src="staff/jas_rice.png" alt="Jas Rice" onerror="this.src='data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns=\'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\' viewBox=\'0 0 24 24\' fill=\'%23cbd5e1\'><path d=\'M12 12c2.21 0 4-1.79 4-4s-1.79-4-4-4-4 1.79-4 4 1.79 4 4 4zm0 2c-2.67 0-8 1.34-8 4v2h16v-2c0-2.66-5.33-4-8-4z\'/></svg>'">
<h5 class="fw-bold m-0" style="color: #1e293b; font-size: 1.1rem;">Jas Rice</h5>
<span class="staff-role">CDT Administrator</span>
:::
:::

<!-- Delmiro Daladier Sampaio -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.staff-card}
<img class="staff-img" src="staff/delmiro_daladier_sampaio.png" alt="Delmiro Daladier Sampaio" onerror="this.src='data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns=\'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\' viewBox=\'0 0 24 24\' fill=\'%23cbd5e1\'><path d=\'M12 12c2.21 0 4-1.79 4-4s-1.79-4-4-4-4 1.79-4 4 1.79 4 4 4zm0 2c-2.67 0-8 1.34-8 4v2h16v-2c0-2.66-5.33-4-8-4z\'/></svg>'">
<h5 class="fw-bold m-0" style="color: #1e293b; font-size: 1.1rem;">Delmiro Daladier Sampaio</h5>
<span class="staff-role">Research Software Engineer</span>
:::
:::

:::
